scope: C1 executor sandbox + C2 server hardening re-verification (launch checklist F2)

environment.note: suite also green in CI on >=3.11; NARAD_HOME isolated to a temp dir for every run

cases.ast_blocked_imports: subprocess/requests/urllib/importlib import forms all rejected pre-exec
cases.ast_blocked_calls_and_evasions: os.system, os.execvp, shutil.rmtree, eval, __import__, getattr-composition ('sys'+'tem'), open('/etc/passwd') all rejected
cases.env_is_scrubbed: planted EXECUTOR_TEST_API_KEY never crosses into the child env; only the allowlist (OUTPUT_DIR, PATH essentials) is present
cases.timeout_kills_process: wall-clock limit kills the whole process group -> status=timeout
cases.dharma_gate_allows_by_default: executor action permitted under default policy

checks.default_bind: 127.0.0.1 (narad_server_entry.py default; remote access requires explicit rebind AND bearer token)
checks.public_shell: GET / (SPA shell) and /health -> 200 without token (no user data in shell)
checks.cors: pinned to Vite dev origins; extend via NARAD_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

server_hardening.method: live server boot on loopback (ports 8124/8125), curl status-code assertions

full_battery: 119 passed + 42 subtests across phase-1/phase-7/phase-9 after cross-suite NARAD_HOME pollution fix (commit 5942ad8)
